main.description: A portal connecting this server to a room on another federated server. Published for discovery so other servers and clients can see the network topology.

sourceRoom.description: Room ID on this server where the portal is located

direction.description: Direction of the portal exit in the source room

targetRoom.description: Room ID on the destination server

requiredLevel.description: Minimum level required to use this portal

bidirectional.description: Whether the target server has a corresponding portal back
